_comment: Merge this entry into the dash-board.in portfolio registry, matching the existing entries' exact schema/field names before committing.
title: RaftKV
backend: static (project page); cluster runs via docker compose
description: Replicated, strongly-consistent key-value store with the Raft consensus protocol implemented from scratch in Go: leader election, log replication, crash-safe persistence, snapshots, linearizable reads, exactly-once sessions. Verified with deterministic fault injection, Porcupine linearizability checking, and live chaos testing.
